title: Questions from Quarantine: Advances in COVID-19 Science and Governance
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The article presents a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine' featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, who answer public questions about navigating the COVID-19 crisis. It invites audience participation via social media using the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. The content is framed within the context of the Security and Global Health Project, aiming to provide guidance on staying 'sane and sanitary' during the pandemic. The article references related expert analyses on topics such as megacity safety planning, global supply chains, and the potential for mass migration crises. It also includes links to other posts discussing specific virology topics like H3N2 'Subclade K' and policy debates concerning mRNA vaccine research funding, situating the discussion at the intersection of emerging technology, scientific advancement, and global governance.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为“隔离问题”的每周网络系列节目，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持，回答公众关于应对COVID-19危机的疑问。该节目鼓励观众通过社交媒体使用标签#QuestionsFromQuarantine进行互动。内容被置于“安全与全球健康项目”的框架内，旨在为疫情期间保持“理智与卫生”提供指导。文章提及了相关的专家分析，主题涵盖特大城市安全规划、全球供应链以及潜在的大规模移民危机。文中还链接了其他帖子，讨论了诸如H3N2“亚支K”等具体病毒学话题，以及关于mRNA疫苗研究资金的政策辩论，将讨论置于新兴技术、科学进步和全球治理的交汇点上。
